summary: Addresses 3 production-relevant bugs identified by external reviewer (greptile-apps[bot]): (1) WaitForExternalSecret now handles NotFound as normal not-ready state instead of propagating wrapped error that breaks IsNotFound detection for callers, (2) GetTLSSecret validates tls.crt/tls.key presence to prevent silent nil byte slices when cert-manager hasn't populated the Secret yet, (3) RunJob treats AlreadyExists on replacement Create as transient (finalizer-pending old Job) instead of surfacing spurious error. Each fix includes a dedicated test case.

tests_checklist.item: All unit tests pass (34/34 across job/, secrets/, tls/)
Each fix has a dedicated test (TestWaitForExternalSecret_notFound, TestGetTLSSecret_missingTLSKeys, TestRunJob_existingComplete_specChanged_alreadyExists)
Edge cases covered: NotFound, empty Data map, AlreadyExists via client interceptor
Tests use gomega matchers with NewGomegaWithT(t) per mandatory pattern
Test assertions are specific (ContainSubstring("missing key"), BeFalse with message, Equal(1) for createCalls)

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing error handling patterns (IsNotFound→false,nil for polling; IsAlreadyExists→false,nil for transient)
Error messages include resource identity (namespace/name) and descriptive context
No dead code, no commented-out code

security_checklist.item: No user input handling (internal K8s API interactions only)
Error messages do not leak sensitive data

architecture_checklist.item: Changes are minimal and targeted to exactly the 3 reported issues
No scope creep beyond external review feedback
Semantic distinction preserved: polling functions (Wait/Is) return (false,nil) for NotFound; accessor functions (Get) return error

fail_fast_checklist.item: GetTLSSecret fails fast with descriptive error when tls.crt/tls.key missing
RunJob returns early on AlreadyExists instead of retrying

defensive_checklist.item: GetTLSSecret validates expected keys before returning (handles nil/empty Data safely)
WaitForExternalSecret guards against ExternalSecret not-yet-created timing window
RunJob guards against finalizer-delayed deletion timing window
